sinks.expression:
wp_send_json_error(
				array(
					'errorCode'    => 'INFO_FETCH_ERROR',
					'errorMessage' => 'Plugin installation failed, could not retrieve plugin info',
				),
				500
			)

sanitizers.expression: esc_html( __( "We're sorry to see you go", 'leadin' ) )
esc_html( __( "If you have a moment, please let us know why you're deactivating the plugin", 'leadin' ) )
esc_html( __( 'The HubSpot plugin is not connected right now To use HubSpot tools on your WordPress site, %1$sconnect the plugin now%2$s', 'leadin' ) )
esc_html( __( 'Leave us a review | link opens in a new tab', 'leadin' ) )
